title: RIV-Bench Remediation Case
description: A single labeled (misconfiguration, candidate_remediation) case for the Remediation Intent Verification Benchmark.

id.description: Stable unique case id, e.g. cis-aws-0001.

framework.description: Openly available framework the control belongs to.

control_ref.description: Human reference to the control. Benchmark numbering is version-dependent; this is descriptive, not a pinned identifier.

control_title.description: Short statement of what the control requires.

description.description: One or two sentences describing the case and what is being tested.

iac.description: Optional. IaC language/dialect the snippets are written in.

misconfiguration.description: The configuration that violates the control (snippet or description).

candidate_remediation.description: The proposed fix (snippet or description) whose intent-satisfaction is being judged.

lint_status.description: Whether the candidate remediation is syntactically/structurally valid and applies cleanly under a standard validator.

control_intent_satisfied.description: Ground truth: does the candidate remediation actually satisfy the control's intent, judged against intent_predicate.

rationale.description: Why the case carries its label; the reasoning a verifier would need to get this right.

tags.description: Optional descriptors, e.g. cross-rule, operationally-broken, partial-fix.
